steps.title: Use both sound examples
steps.content: The student wants to contrast two words that represent the same sound. The notes give the shared sound, snoring, and the two forms to compare: Batak "korrrr" and Mandarin Chinese "hu lu." A contrast signal is needed because the goal is not just to name the words.

steps.title: Reject missing contrasts
steps.content: Choice B makes only a general statement about onomatopoeias. Choice C includes both examples but does not contrast how they are written and pronounced. Choice D mentions only the Batak example. The answer is A.
